requirements.task_name: Request a quote for the cheapest VR safety training package for 50 employees under $15,000
requirements.task_description: Find VR-based safety training services, filter them to support at least 50 participants with a budget cap of $15,000, choose the cheapest option that meets these criteria, and submit a quote request including group size and a specific start date.

requirements.task_name: Choose an AR product launch campaign under $40,000 with at least 100K expected reach
requirements.task_description: Find AR marketing campaign services for product launches, filter to campaigns under $40,000, compare options, and select the one that both costs less than $40,000 and lists an expected reach of at least 100,000 people, then start a project brief form.

requirements.task_name: Create a shortlist of 3 VR case studies from retail, healthcare, and education industries
requirements.task_description: Browse case studies, find one VR project each in retail, healthcare, and education, and add all three to a saved 'Training ideas' shortlist or collection.

requirements.task_name: Configure an immersive pop-up installation in New York with a total estimate between $25,000 and $35,000
requirements.task_description: Use the experience configurator to design a pop-up installation in New York for 500–800 attendees in June 2025, including 2 interactive zones and 1 photo booth, adjusting options until the configurator’s estimated total falls between $25,000 and $35,000, then save the configuration to a quote.

requirements.task_name: Register for a beginner XR strategy workshop within the next 60 days under $300
requirements.task_description: Find upcoming workshops or events, filter to beginner-level XR strategy sessions happening within the next 60 days and costing less than $300, choose one that meets these conditions, and complete the on-site registration form.

requirements.task_name: Apply for a mid-level UX Designer role in the XR studio without uploading a file
requirements.task_description: Navigate to the careers section, filter open roles to mid-level UX or Product Designer positions related to XR, select one that requires around 3–5 years of experience, and complete the application form using only text fields (skip any CV upload).

requirements.task_name: Submit a partnership inquiry as an agency partner for white-label XR production with a budget over $60,000
requirements.task_description: Use the contact or partnership page to submit an inquiry as an agency partner interested in white-label XR production services, specifying that you are based in the US and EU markets and that your typical project budget exceeds $60,000.

requirements.task_name: Save 3 articles about XR for museums/exhibitions and retail to a reading list
requirements.task_description: Browse the resources or blog section, find two articles related to museums or exhibitions and one related to retail, and add all three articles to a saved reading list using the site's bookmark or 'Save' feature.
